summary: Finso iteration 2 tested end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 NEW pytest cases passed (test_finso_v2.py) covering /api/settings GET+PUT with persistence, /api/categories defaults (12+) and full CRUD, transactions w/ source_type+account_id/card_id verification, expense via card increases debt, expense via account decreases balance (and DELETE reverts both correctly), card_payment decreases both account balance AND card debt, PATCH account/card/transaction/investment all persist, /api/transfers same-currency + auto FX conversion (TRY→USD ≈ live rate) + manual to_amount override, /api/monthly-stats?months=6 returns 6 buckets with income/expense/net, /api/rates includes live_rates and custom_rates_enabled flag, /api/factory-reset clears everything and reseeds 12 default categories. Frontend (Expo web, mobile 390x844): dashboard renders Banka/Nakit/Dijital/Yatırım/Kart Borcu breakdown cards horizontally, monthly net flow chart with gelir/gider bars visible, settings-btn + transfer-btn navigate. Settings page → Döviz Kurları (live rates shown, toggle-custom-rates works), Kategoriler (expense/income filter, edit sheet with cat-name/cat-save/cat-delete present), Fabrika Ayarlarına Dön (reset-confirm wired to /api/factory-reset). Transfer modal renders from/to chips and switches to manual conversion. Add Transaction modal exposes 3 type chips (expense/income/card_payment), src-account/src-card toggle, acc-{id} and card-{id} chips populate correctly when toggling source. Edit flows reachable from Cüzdan/Harcamalar/Yatırımlar tabs by tapping rows; trash (delete) and save buttons visible in edit modes. Deprecated packages detected: none. Console warnings detected: shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents deprecations (non-blocking).

react_native_issues.issue: Console: 'shadow*' style props deprecated → use 'boxShadow'. 'textShadow*' deprecated → use 'textShadow'. props.pointerEvents deprecated → use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking.

action_items: OPTIONAL (testID polish to match spec): rename in code: from-/to- → tr-from-/tr-to-; save-tx-btn → tx-save; account-/card-holo-/card-detail- → wallet-acc-/wallet-card-; add-expense-btn → add-transaction-btn. Functionality is correct — only naming differs from review-request testIDs.
OPTIONAL: migrate deprecated shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents props to new web style API to silence RN-web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend transaction effects (_apply_account_delta / _apply_card_delta) correctly convert cross-currency via TRY and revert on DELETE; verified for expense (card+account), income, card_payment.
Transfer endpoint creates a transfer-type transaction with to_account_id/to_amount/to_currency and correctly auto-converts using live rates or honors manual to_amount.
All GET endpoints exclude MongoDB _id via projection; no leakage observed.
ensure_categories() seeds 12 default categories on first request and after factory-reset; idempotent.
monthly-stats correctly buckets last N months and sums amount_try in TRY base.
server.py at ~760 lines is approaching split threshold (700). Consider modularizing accounts/cards/transactions/transfers/settings into separate routers.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows; testID names differ from spec but all UI elements present and functional

seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed?force=true used inside test fixture and again after factory-reset to restore demo state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://finso-finance.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend env key: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_finso_api.py (v1) + /app/backend/tests/test_finso_v2.py (v2). Seed via POST /api/seed?force=true before regression. TestID naming mismatches vs original spec are noted under frontend_issues.testid_naming_mismatches_vs_spec — UI works but selectors per spec will need to use the actual testIDs listed.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found this iteration. Only naming inconsistencies between the review-request testIDs and the implemented testIDs. All requested behaviors (settings, edit/delete on all entities, transfer with currency conversion, source selector for transactions, monthly stats chart, card_payment type, factory reset) are implemented and pass backend assertions plus visual frontend checks.
